properties.name: Backend API
properties.description: HTTP REST API and WebSocket bridge for board CRUD, project switching, skill triggering, snapshots, search, diagnostics, render endpoints. Hosts the route layer that delegates to services.
properties.bounded_context: External-facing contract (routes + WS) for the analyst-tool

properties.name: Renderers
properties.description: Deterministic TypeScript renderers that transform Neo4j graph state into Excalidraw scenes (4 board kinds) and Markdown documents (6 subtypes). Source-of-truth for graph→board content.

properties.name: Skill Runner
properties.description: Subprocess orchestration via itsalt-pinch Pacer with run-queue for concurrency control, skill invocation (regenerate/sync/analyze/render-md), and lifecycle event broadcasting.

properties.name: Web UI
properties.description: Vite + React + Zustand frontend embedding the Excalidraw editor; project picker, board navigator, canvas host, status bar, run panel, snapshot browser.

properties.name: E2E Suite
properties.description: Playwright end-to-end tests covering load, canvas, search, status bar, snapshots, multi-project switch.
